scope.shape: standard meta + entries/messages/list, PLUS two lines-sections carrying a file-local renderLiveRead helper (string[]); async loader

necessityProof.blockerResolved: The last pure-standard-with-tests renderer (the minimal shard readiness live-read gate) still hand-built its title/meta/section frame; its two live-read sections used a local renderLiveRead helper that maps cleanly to the builder's lines section.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can classify the live-read gate report as builder-backed, and this is the first demonstration that the lines section absorbs local list-helpers byte-identically.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: renderLiveRead returns string[]; the builder's lines section takes readonly string[] and emits it verbatim with builder-managed blank lines, matching the hand-written spread exactly.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new helper. After this batch the pure-standard subset is genuinely empty (0 with tests, 0 testless).

censusPostV2144.detection: corrected (matches barrel/report stem, not just the Renderer import)
censusPostV2144.implication: Next batch (v2145) needs an explicit direction decision: (A) use lines-sections to carry raw line-blocks of h3/for renderers byte-identically (reduced structural benefit), or (B) extend the builder so entries can accept a [label, value] array form to absorb the map/flatMap renderers (builder change needs its own tests + per-file byte compares).

focusedRendererBatch.note: 3 live-read gate cases (ready path with fake clients, fail-closed when probes disabled, and JSON+Markdown route injection against mock HTTP/TCP servers) + ratchet

byteIdentical.method: The route test asserts Markdown via toContain, so a throwaway async harness (reusing the test's fake clients and probes-enabled config) rendered the report before and after the edit and diffed them. The only difference was the runtime '- Generated at:' line; all 19 meta lines and both live-read lines-sections were byte-identical. Harness and .tmp dumps deleted before commit.

lint.note: 0 errors; existing warnings are tracked as N5 lint debt and were not introduced by the v2145 documentation-only closeout.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2115-renderer-consolidation-batch-27-v2144.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2144 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation.
